rationale: The cited paper appears only as a brief prior example in the discussion of vice justification, specifically noting that consumers may legitimize vice purchases when items are on sale (Khan and Dhar 2010). The core theory, hypotheses, and five studies in the citing paper are built around physical involvement, responsibility attribution, and unhealthy eating, not around bundle discount framing. Because the citation is grouped as background evidence rather than used to develop or test the paper's focal model, its role is a passing literature mention.
